User Signup: When a new account is created
Every time a customer creates an account
User Login: Every time a user logs in
When someone signs into their account
When a customer accesses their account
New Order: When a new order is placed
Whenever a customer places an order
Every time an order is submitted
Payment Failed: When the payment cannot be processed
Order Cancelled: Whenever a customer cancels an order
If a customer cancels their order
Contact Form Submitted: When a contact form is submitted
After a customer submits the contact form
Whenever someone fills out the contact form
Once a contact request is submitted
When a visitor sends a contact request
Whenever a contact message is received
When a customer submits an enquiry
Every time a contact form is completed
File Uploaded: Whenever a user uploads a file
Once a file is successfully uploaded
Whenever a new file is received
Every time a file is uploaded
Invoice Generated: Whenever a new invoice is created
When a billing invoice is generated
Every time an invoice is generated
Support Ticket Created: When a support ticket is created
Whenever a customer raises a support ticket
Once a support request is submitted
When a new support case is opened
Whenever a help desk ticket is created
When a customer reports an issue
Every time a support ticket is opened
